prompt: A polished architectural presentation board for a modern minimalist villa, shown as a photorealistic dusk exterior rendering of a symmetrical two-story luxury house. The main hero image fills the upper portion: a front-facing contemporary home with a clean white and charcoal facade, broad overhanging roof, full-width balcony with glass railing, floor-to-ceiling warm-lit windows, centered dark entry door, landscaped lawn, paved path, subtle garden lights, and visible solar panels covering most of the roof. The mood is elegant, high-end, calm evening blue hour lighting with warm interior glow, realistic materials, soft shadows, and premium real-estate visualization quality. The lower portion is a clean presentation layout on a white background with Chinese labels and thin divider lines, like an architecture concept board. On the left is a text block with 1 title and 3 specification lines: the title reads 现代极简风格别墅, followed by area text, dimensions text, and structure/features text in Chinese. In the center are 2 labeled floor plans, each drawn in grayscale architectural plan style with furniture and room outlines: one labeled "一层平面图" and one labeled "二层平面图", both marked with dimensions 13000 by 10000. On the right side is a vertical column of 4 interior perspective thumbnails, each with Chinese room labels: "客厅", "餐厅", "主卧", "主卧". Along the bottom is a horizontal strip of 4 additional perspective thumbnails labeled "厨房", "楼梯间", "卫生间", "阳台". Total thumbnail renders: 8, total floor plans: 2, total major layout sections: 4. The interior thumbnails should match the same house design language: warm neutral palette, beige and wood tones, minimalist luxury furniture, integrated lighting, clean cabinetry, modern staircase, hotel-like bathroom, and scenic balcony seating. Overall style is a premium developer sales board or architect concept sheet, crisp grid layout, balanced margins, editorial presentation, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, high resolution.
